normalization: The provider OpenAPI schema was reduced to field, enum, and prompt-binding observations needed by the registered claims.
rights_note: Only normalized schema facts are retained; the complete provider OpenAPI document is not committed.

items.normalized_evidence: fal's reference-to-video input uses separate image, video, and audio URL arrays, and its field descriptions use compact at-sign ordinals such as Image1, Video1, and Audio1 for prompt references.

The current fal reference-to-video input schema lists prompt, media arrays, resolution, duration, aspect ratio, audio generation, bitrate mode, and end-user ID; it does not list seed as an input field.
The current standard fal reference-to-video schema enumerates 4k among its resolution values, while other variants can expose narrower resolution sets.

notes: These observations are volatile provider API fields and require a seven-day or shorter refresh policy.
